title: Yathaarth
desc: A time travel story of a husband & wife who revisit their past memories through a new technology called Alternate Reality Correction Services, thinking they can resolve their own issues through it.

title: Raat Hamaari Hai
desc: Rakesh, a virgin, is set up by his friends with an escort, Madhu(who happens to be a psychology student). They both have opposite thoughts on sex and a debate ensues between them over the course of the night and then finally what happens between them.

title: Husbands
desc: When Aadav visits his ex-wife’s house to give his son a gift, he is greeted at the door by Satvik, the man who has replaced him in his ex's life, and maybe even his son’s.

title: Cuddles
desc: Based on short story by Larissa Theule, Cuddles follows the story of 30-year-old Krita as she has a chance encounter with Chirag uncle after almost 20 years in a park.

title: Do Cutting
desc: An unforgettable love story about how a couple due to societal pressures on inter religion marriages hold up their lives.

title: Curd
desc: CURD is the story of Hira, who is visiting her son in the US. Unable to spend time with him because of his busy schedule, Hira feels trapped in her house and struggles with the alien culture and loneliness.

title: Chilgam
desc: A story of love and courage that strives to sustain amidst a communally-charged environment.

title: Kathi Pe Ghoda
desc: An old man living a life full of mistakes gets an extraordinary experience only to realize that he is the ultimate creator of his destiny.

title: The Night Before
desc: On the night before her wedding an Indian - American bride pays visit to her ex whom she ghosted years ago

title: Dhruv & Jai
desc: Dhruv returns from London after completing his studies and goes straight to meet Jai. He ends up waiting for him in his room where he remembers their time together through Jai’s poems and photographs. He looks disturbed as he tries to keep one particular memory at bay all the while wondering what will happen when Jai walks in the door.

title: Homecoming
desc: Happiness comes knocking at the door on one of her most gloomy days during the pandemic. She embraces it & now it ain't easy to go

title: Eelu Rani Bhag Gaye
desc: Two teenagers running away from their home comes across a police officer who persuades them not to go, however Eelu & Rani have something else on their mind.

title: On The Way of Love
desc: A simple story of how a husband & wife realizes about the presence & support for each other during the pandemic.

title: Panic
desc: A riveting psychological thriller that propels an aspiring actor's life into chaos when a toothache triggers an unfounded belief in oral cancer, setting off a catastrophic chain of events.

title: Painkiller
desc: Ronnie’s world comes crashing down, when his wife leaves him. The feeling of losing his wife and daughter is something he can’t wrap his head around.

title: Thank You For Sharing
desc: This dark topical narrates the story of Jude, who's been suffering from psychosis, a mental health illness & has an aberrational relation with the voice in his head.

title: The Last Letter
desc: A sweet, endearing tale of two old school lovers and their conversations, carried out over shy, fond letters creating an emotional heart touching last letter.

title: The Bench
desc: A young man’s monotonous life turns upside down when he meets a stranger on a bench.

title: Omlette
desc: After being unable to contact her son Rohan and her daughter-in-law for days, Anupama visits Rohan’s place to find out the reason behind this unusual behaviour and an evening full of tension and emotions lead to a shocking end to her search.

title: Naam Kya Hai
desc: Set in the 1992 riots in Mumbai, "Naam Kya Hai?" revolves around a distraught and prejudiced police officer trying to avenge the murder of his wife amidst the communal tension in the city.

title: Eelu Rani Bhag Gaye
desc: Two teenagers running away from their home comes across a police officer who persuades them not to go, however Eelu & Rani have something else on their mind.

title: Yathaarth
desc: A time travel story of a husband & wife who revisit their past memories through a new technology called Alternate Reality Correction Services, thinking they can resolve their own issues through it.

desc: When Aadav visits his ex-wife’s house to give his son a gift, he is greeted at the door by Satvik, the man who has replaced him in his ex's life, and maybe even his son’s.
